## Automated Tests Required

### 22-1 Extend PlatformWorkbookImporter write-gate to Mounts/Loadouts/Magazines/Comms (S22-01) — Integration (primary; Logic secondary)

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Platform/PlatformWorkbookImporterTests.cs` and `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/WriteGate/CatalogWriteGateTests.cs` (extend existing)

**What to test**:
- Importer commits Mounts/Loadouts/Mags/Comms via gate (from kickoff AC + GDD 21 PLE-3.1 "Excel-originated changes reach live tables only after ApproveBatch"; PLE-3.2 bulk M change-log + one staging batch; from 06 DBI-1.4 "no orphan staging rows"; DBI-3.1 referential integrity).
- `PlatformWorkbookRoundTripTests` + `ImporterTests` pass (kickoff AC; GDD 21 PLE-1.1 deterministic export with stable sort by (PlatformId, *Id), PLE-2.1 diff empty on unedited round-trip, PLE-2.2 stale snapshot reject).
- GitNexus impact on `CatalogWriteGate` checked (CRITICAL) before edit (kickoff risk + AGENTS.md; extend-only per GDD 21 "only add new Propose*Batch overloads").
- From GDD 21: PLE-4.2 mount/weapon incompatibility and magazine-over-capacity produce blocking findings; PLE-5.1-5.3 provenance roundtrip and normalization; PLE-6.1-6.3 CLI/MCP surface without auto-commit.
- From 06: DBI-2.1-2.2 enum/sanity validation (range ≤0, Mach>25), DBI-7.1 Propose rejects empty, DBI-7.3 Canonical IDs stable.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero/minimum (empty batch, 0 quantity magazine)
- Invalid FK (bad MountId/WeaponId -> quarantine per PLE-2.3, DBI-3.4; never in sim export)
- Bulk >10 records or balanceCritical -> require explicit ApproveBatch (not auto, per PLE-3.3, DBI-2.4)
- Incompatible mount/weapon or magazine depth > capacity (PLE-4.2)
- No formula in GDD for some — derived from ACs + GDD ACs; review GDD Formulas/Edge before writing tests.

**Estimated test count**: ~10-12 (4x Propose*Batch for new types, roundtrip golden, diff, approve/reject paths, quarantine, provenance, determinism ORDER BY composite/Canonical, CLI verb parity).

### 22-2 Add CLI verbs platform_export_xlsx / platform_import_xlsx / platform_diff_xlsx (S22-02) — Integration

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/McpToolsManifestTests.cs` (extend); integration for verbs.

**What to test**:
- Verbs execute (`dotnet run -- platform_export_xlsx`); manifest test passes; JSON output via `McpToolResult`; MCP tool schemas defined (kickoff AC + GDD 21 PLE-6.1-6.3).
- Same IWriteGate path (no auto-commit).

**Edge cases**: bad snapshot, large workbook, manifest drift.

**Estimated**: 4-6 tests + CLI smoke.

### 22-4 Extend CmoMarkdownImporter to platform + weapon/mount entries (S22-04) — Integration (Logic for parse + orphan guard)

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Import/CmoMarkdownImporterTests.cs` (extend with Baltic fixture for platform).

**What to test**:
- Platform + weapon/mount parsed from markdown; `ProposePlatformBatch` stages correctly; no sensor regression; orphan staging guard (DBI-1.4 AC explicit); CatalogWriteGate impact checked (kickoff + 06/21 rules).
- DBI-1.1/1.4 (post-commit GetSorted* reflects in fixed order; no orphan staging rows), DBI-7.1 (Propose rejects empty), DBI-8.3 (no IWriteGate bypass).

**Edge cases**: orphan guard (DBI-1.4), bad platform/weapon compat (PLE-4.2), TRL/provenance on new entries.

**Estimated**: 6-8 tests.

### 22-5 Unity Doctrine Inheritance Panel (Req 13) (S22-05) — UI (panel bind) + Integration (dispatch)

**Test file path**: Extend `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/.../PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests.cs` + new headless command roundtrip (per ADR-010 + kickoff).

**What to test**:
- `SetDoctrineOverride` dispatches deterministically headless (command round-trip per ADR-010); PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests pass; ZERO touch to DelegationBridge in all code/tests (kickoff AC + GDD 13 AC1-6 + inheritance model).
- Snapshot immutable except via logged PolicyUpdate; FireAbortReason for explain; "SetDoctrineOverride" + projection bind.

**Edge cases**: policy change during replay (proposed: yes + logged); inheritance order strict (unit > embarked > mission > group > side > scenario); Cautious agent respects hold fire with FireAbortReason (GDD 13 AC2).

**Estimated**: 5-7 (headless dispatch + PlayMode extension + ZERO touch verification via impact/no new callers).

### 22-6 IBalanceTelemetrySink real accumulator + win-rate flag (S22-06) — Logic

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Telemetry/` or appropriate (new or extend).

**What to test**:
- Real accumulator (no stub); flag fires at ±8% threshold (DBI-5.3; tuneable); feature flag `enableBalanceDrift` defaults false; no write-gate bypass (DBI-5.2/5.1 advisory only); golden-hash test passes (kickoff + 06 DBI-5).

**Edge cases**: threshold exactly at band; no write-gate side-effect (DBI-5.1/5.2).

**Estimated**: 4-6 (accumulator, flag, feature default, golden, no bypass).

### 22-7 OSINT OsintCatalogMapper TL routing (S22-07) — Integration

**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Osint/OsintCatalogMapperTests.cs` (extend).

**What to test**:
- TL routing (`proposedTL`/`targetDoc` → TrlLevel + branch on staged bindings); no IWriteGate bypass (DBI-8.3 hard AC); determinism test passes (stable OrderBy) (kickoff + 06 DBI-8.1/8.3).

**Edge cases**: rejected TL never promotes; stable OrderBy.

**Estimated**: 3-5.

*(Full details and "No formula found in referenced GDD — test cases must be derived from acceptance criteria directly. Review the GDD Formulas section before writing tests." applied where relevant. See qa-lead subagent output for exhaustive PLE-*/DBI-*/AC1-6 mappings.)*

## Manual QA Checklist

### 22-5 Unity Doctrine Inheritance Panel (Req 13) (S22-05) — UI / Integration

**Verification method**: Playtest session + screenshot/video of panel + command dispatch; code review + gitnexus impact for ZERO touch.

**Who must sign off**: unity-specialist / c-sharp-engineer / qa-lead (per kickoff DoD and team-unity rules)

**Evidence to capture**: video of panel binding ResolvedUnitPolicy, SetDoctrineOverride dispatch in headless + PlayMode, inheritance diagram visible, no regression on existing C2/DelegationBridge flows (e.g. OnEnable, RunBatch still work); PlayMode smoke pass log.

Checklist:
- [ ] WRA/ROE/EMCON fields bind to ResolvedUnitPolicy projection (from kickoff AC + GDD 13 inheritance model and AC1-2)
- [ ] `SetDoctrineOverride` command dispatched from panel, deterministically headless (AC + GDD 13 AC6 headless identical, ADR-010)
- [ ] PlayMode smoke passes (kickoff Quality Gates + GDD 13 ACs)
- [ ] ZERO touch to `DelegationBridge` (CRITICAL 77 upstream per gitnexus; no new direct calls or mutations; route via command + projection per ADR-010 and kickoff risk mitigation)
- [ ] Inheritance visual (unit/mission/side) correct and explainable (GDD 13 AC1, FireAbortReason)
- [ ] No S1/S2 bugs; no bypass of policy (GDD 13 agent integration, "My Weapon Won’t Fire" explainability)

*If any criterion uses subjective language, supplemented with benchmark (e.g. dispatch latency < X ms in headless).*

### 22-3 Author ADR-011 platform-editor-excel-roundtrip (S22-03) — Config/Data

**Verification method**: Manual review + sign-off.

**Who must sign off**: writer / lead-programmer (per kickoff).

**Evidence**: The ADR file exists at `docs/architecture/adr-011-platform-editor-excel-roundtrip.md` and is referenced in `Game-Requirements/requirements/21-Platform-Editor.md`; covers Phase A decisions (exporter, importer, write-gate staging, ClosedXML boundary, Phase B scope).

Checklist:
- [ ] ADR exists and referenced (kickoff AC)
- [ ] Covers locked decisions from GDD 21 + sprint kickoff (Excel round-trip, write-gate only, Phase A scope, governance)
- [ ] No contradictions with DoD/Quality Gates/GitNexus rules in kickoff

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint (from sprint kickoff Quality Gates + general per qa-plan skill):

```powershell
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj --filter "PlatformWorkbook|Importer|WriteGate|Catalog"
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj --filter Mcp
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj --filter PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests
# S22-05 Doctrine Panel: headless command test + PlayMode smoke (ADR-010)
```

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game / new session can be started
3. Platform editor CLI verbs (platform_export_xlsx / import / diff) execute and produce valid workbook + manifest test passes (S22-02)
4. Write-gate staging for new entity types (Mounts/Loadouts/Magazines/Comms) via extended IWriteGate.Propose*Batch without orphan rows (DBI-1.4) or bypass (S22-01/04)
5. Unity Doctrine Inheritance Panel binds projection, dispatches command, PlayMode smoke + headless roundtrip passes (S22-05 + "S22-05 Doctrine Panel: headless command test + PlayMode smoke (ADR-010)")
6. Save / load cycle completes without data loss (if applicable for catalog snapshots)
7. Performance within budget (no new frame spikes from panel or importer; target hardware)

*Smoke tests are verified by the developer via `/smoke-check`. Reference this list and the 4 dotnet test commands in sprint kickoff when running that skill. Run before QA hand-off / Polish gate.*

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

(From sprint kickoff md DoD, which explicitly calls out the QA plan requirement; augmented per qa-plan skill)

- [ ] All Must Have tasks completed
- [ ] All tasks pass acceptance criteria
- [ ] QA plan exists (`production/qa/qa-plan-sprint-22.md`)
- [ ] All Logic/Integration stories have passing unit/integration tests
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] QA sign-off report: APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS (`/team-qa sprint`)
- [ ] No S1 or S2 bugs in delivered features
- [ ] Design documents updated for any deviations
- [ ] Code reviewed and merged
- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)

> ⚠️ **No QA Plan**: This sprint was started without a QA plan. Run `/qa-plan sprint` before the last story is implemented. The Production → Polish gate requires a QA sign-off report, which requires a QA plan. (Addressed by this plan.)

MapPlaceholder OnEnable + runners; confirmed); `gitnexus_detect_changes` before commit; stable OrderBy on CanonicalId for new batches (determinism gap: new Catalog* currently lack it per analysis; LoadSorted dirt in SqliteCatalogReader affects catalog flows — 34 files/8 symbols/high risk per detect-changes on unstaged).
